subject: History
chapter: Weavers, Iron Smelters and Factory Owners

activities_projects.title: Industrial Change Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyze how industrialization affected traditional industries
steps: Read about the introduction of machine-made cloth
Explain how it affected Indian weavers
Write your analysis in 8–10 points
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyze the impact of industrialization on traditional workers

activities_projects.title: Case Study – Indian Weavers
activities_projects.objective: Understand the challenges faced by Indian weavers
steps: Study the conditions of Indian weavers during British rule
List problems they faced due to factory production
Write a short case study explaining their situation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students critically understand historical economic changes

activities_projects.title: Comparison Table – Handloom vs Factory Production
activities_projects.objective: Compare traditional and industrial production methods
steps: Create a table comparing handloom weaving and factory production
Include points like speed, cost, labour, and quality
Explain which system became dominant and why

activities_projects.title: Iron Smelting Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Understand traditional iron smelting and its decline
steps: Read about the work of Indian iron smelters
Explain the process they used to produce iron
Describe why their work declined with the arrival of modern industries
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyze the impact of new technology on traditional occupations

activities_projects.title: Economic Impact Study
activities_projects.objective: Examine economic consequences of factory industries in India
steps: Identify economic changes caused by British industrial policies
Explain how they affected artisans and workers
Write your findings in 8–10 points
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand economic transformations during colonial rule
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and depth of analysis (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Historical Source Interpretation
activities_projects.objective: Interpret historical descriptions related to weaving
steps: Read a short passage about Indian weaving
Identify the viewpoint of the writer
Explain what the source reveals about the weaving industry
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop skills in interpreting historical sources

activities_projects.title: Debate – Machine Production vs Handloom
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate advantages and disadvantages of industrialization
steps: Divide the class into two groups
One group supports factory production
The other supports traditional handloom weaving
Present arguments with examples
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop critical thinking and reasoning skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of arguments and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Flowchart – Growth of Factory Industry
activities_projects.objective: Understand the development of factories in India
steps: List important developments leading to factory industries
Arrange them in a sequence
Create a flowchart showing industrial growth
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students visualize the process of industrial development

activities_projects.title: Historical Report – Industrial Transformation
steps: Write a report explaining how industrialization changed traditional industries in India
Include weavers, iron smelters, and factory owners
Conclude with the overall impact on Indian society
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students synthesize historical information into structured writing
activities_projects.evaluation: Organization and depth of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Research Poster – Traditional vs Modern Industry
activities_projects.objective: Encourage deeper research on industrial changes
steps: Collect information about traditional industries and modern factories
Create a poster comparing both systems
Present your findings in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students integrate research and visual presentation skills
